message:
fix(vdbe): remove unreachable early return in aggregate wrapper codegen

The explicit `return;` at the end of the COALESCE-wrapping branch in
emit_agg_wrapper was unreachable because it sat at the end of a match arm
that already falls through naturally. Removing it has no behavioral change
but eliminates a clippy/compiler warning about unreachable code and makes the
control flow clearer: after resolving the done_label, execution continues to
the end of the function regardless of which branch was taken.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
